arc: R4v: P3 associativity relink -- append-op census ledger -> engine handle translation -> write.block.relink_hatch_assoc (id-derived loop replacement) + LEX-0011 cardinality quotient
registered_at_local: 2026-07-11T00:5x (file mtime is the binding evidence; committed BEFORE launch)

r4u_adjudication.cause_measured: R4u was the FIRST flight of 6d59fd5's loop-local assoc extraction (stale-deploy trap had starved every earlier flight). The fresh census reads 66/66 flagged hatches WITH per-loop assoc_source_handles, all 77 refs resolving in-def (63 lwpolyline + 14 spline, 0 unresolved) -- the orphan claim is RETRACTED (docs/ASSOC_ORPHAN_FINDING.md); the rebuild does not re-link, so 66 pairs unmasked as REAL residue. lw-z landed +25 exactly (gainers match predicted defs).

prediction.ceiling_note: 27,123 = 27,130 minus the 7 loops real-geometry pairs (unrepaired, next arc).

evidence: mini E2E probe runs/relink_e2e_probe_20260711: full engine path (append source ledger -> census->rebuilt translation -> native relink) round-trips flag=true + per-loop payload [[<rebuilt lw handle>]] through save/re-extract on the refreshed prebuilt

A/B probe runs/relink_ab_probe_20260711: relink changes ONLY assoc canonical fields on the probe drawing; the loop notation delta observed there (explicit closing vertex) is an authored-vs-derived artifact of the synthetic census

census loop-notation census (66 hatches): 58 edge-loops (line x47/x10/x1 + spline x12/x2) + 5 polyline loops ALL already explicit-close 5-verts -- i.e. the census stores AutoCAD's own derived notation; relink preserves each loop's original loop_type, and the type drives the derived form (probe: type 7 -> polyline explicit-close, exactly the census polyline shape)

prediction.band_rationale: single mechanism, probe-verified end-to-end; floor 27,118 absorbs flight noise only. H3/sweep/lw-z families re-fly and are protected by the per-def no-regression guard vs the R4u baseline.
risk_register: derived-loop notation drift: insertLoopAt(ids) re-derives loop data from the rebuilt sources at evaluate time; if the 2027 derivation emits edge decomposition or float noise differing from the census-stored notation, those pairs stay modified on loops[] and the run lands BELOW band -- adjudication rule stays FAIL-to-investigate, never rename

ObjectARX 2027 has NO per-loop assoc setter (dbhatch.h) -- the implementation is removeLoopAt+insertLoopAt(int, type, AcDbObjectIdArray)+evaluateHatch; a C2039 on setAssocObjIdsAt was caught at build time and the header contract is pinned in the registry entry

measurement_contract: LEX-0011 (candidate -> legislates on this adjudication): canonical assoc payload = per-loop source CARDINALITY, order-aligned to loops[] (raw handles are not rebuild-stable); LEX-0008 fold unchanged for sourceless flags. Unit contract: tests/unit/test_blockdef_diff.py assoc cases + tests/unit/test_relink_assoc.py (18 cases: emission, stream tail, ledger passthrough, translation + fail-loud, batch barrier, registry lockstep).

population_pin.required: census must reproduce 294 defs / 27,130 entities; identity sha must equal the pin (LEX-0006); per-def diff0 >= R4u for every def
